flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fairmont State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 2.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fairmont State University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fairmont State University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.1k → $18.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fairmont State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
